metadata.title: Project Sentinel - Brick Breaker IL5 Profile
metadata.remarks: Project-specific OSCAL profile that imports the DoD IL5 baseline and tailors it for the Brick Breaker game application. AI/ML and MCP-specific controls are marked as not applicable since this is a game application, not an AI agent platform.

adds.remarks: The Brick Breaker application uses anonymous score submission and does not implement user account management. No authentication is required to play the game or submit scores.
